name: codemod
purpose: Repo-scale structural rewrites, safely: plan first (stored diffs + content hashes), apply only on a clean tree against an unchanged state, then auto-verify. Engines: ast-grep patterns, libcst presets, optional comby.
reach_for_me_when: you are about to hand-edit the same call pattern across many files
you need a reviewable change plan (diffs, counts) before any file is touched
you want a mechanical rewrite chained straight into verify --changed-only

commands.name: plan
commands.summary: Compute and store a change plan; never writes source files

commands.name: apply
commands.summary: Apply a stored plan (clean tree + unchanged files only), then verify

commands.name: presets
commands.summary: List preset transforms and engine availability
